summary: note edit: central kind guard (refuse non-TEXT/NOTE targets on every write path) and idempotent append (skip when content already ends with the append text).
reason: Greptile PR review P1s: --task-id and single-date-match paths could overwrite a regular task's content while reporting a note update; the per-item-error retry could append the same line twice.
validated_outcome: Live: CHECKLIST task refused with kind error; re-append of an existing trailing line returned already_applied=true with etag unchanged.
